title: looshy pink overlay
description: an epic pink overlay for the looshy pack
body:
![a cartoony logo that says "looshy](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/10432a05623d642ac6aa9eb96bdee8cb50c8f30c.png)
___
### the classic look of minecraft, but PINK?

introducing... pink mode! it's the same pack but now you get to see more things in pink. because everything is better in pink. leaves? pink. diamonds? pink. hearts? pink.
___

### read me first!!

this is an **extension/overlay** and not a standalone pack!

please update to the latest pack release here: [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/looshy/versions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/looshy/versions). this overlay will be updated if any affected textures are updated.
